items.title: Choosing k for marketing segments
items.description: Combine elbow plots and silhouette on scaled customer features to narrow k, then validate segment actionability with campaign pilots—not metrics alone.

items.title: Benchmarking clustering algorithms
items.description: When reference labels exist (e.g. known cell types), report ARI and NMI to compare k-means, hierarchical, and Gaussian mixture solutions on the same preprocessed features.

items.title: Monitoring production segmentation drift
items.description: Track inertia and silhouette on rolling monthly cohorts; sudden drops may signal feature drift, scaling changes, or population shift requiring refit.

items.title: Anomaly and niche group discovery
items.description: Low per-cluster silhouette flags heterogeneous groups that may need higher k, different algorithms, or manual review before operational use.
